case_title: MURRAY W PENDER VS. THE CITISCOPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $924.00 FILED BY PENDER, MURRAY W AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITISCOPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITISCOPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL L. MAU. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SU KEMP--SENIOR HOUSING. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL L. MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
